title: X-leg Console Table with shelves
summary: Looking for the perfect entryway table?
description: Looking for the perfect entryway table? This X-leg Console table combines style and function. The shelves provide added storage and can look amazing when styled. This unique design blends right in with any decor – farmhouse or modern.

steps.title: Build the legs
steps.body: Drill 1 1/2" pocket hole screws and attach the long angled cut to the legs supports using 2 1/2" pocket screws. Attach the short angled cuts using 2 1/2" pocket screws to create the X. Note - the 40-degree angle is towards the middle of the X.

steps.title: Build shelves and Top
steps.body: Drill 1 1/2" pocket hole screws and put together the two shelves and top using 2 1/2" pocket screws.

steps.title: Attach legs to top
steps.body: Lay the top face down and attach the two X-legs using 1 1/2" wood screws drilled into the leg supports. Make sure the pocket holes face inside.

steps.title: Attach middle shelf
steps.body:
Attach the top dividers and the middle shelf. Use 1 1/2" pocket holes and 2 1/2" pocket screws.
The dividers are 12 1/4" from each end. The shelf is 13 1/2"" from the Top.
There are pocket holes on the ends of the shelf that attach to the middle of the X.

steps.title: Attach bottom shelf
steps.body:
Attach the bottom divider and the bottom shelf using 1 1/2" pocket holes and 2 1/2" pocket screws. The divider is 18 1/4"" from one end.
The Bottom shelf is attached to the leg supports using pocket holes and screws.

steps.title: Final steps
steps.body:
The X-leg console table is ready.
Sand and finish as desired.

steps.title: Visit anikasdiylife.com
steps.body: For lots more plans and projects visit www.anikasdiylife.com
